newsletters.subject: The Fable 5 Kill-Switch, Two Weeks On
newsletters.author: Kim "Chubby" Isenberg

main_article.title: The Fable 5 Kill-Switch, Two Weeks On
main_article.summary: Two-week retrospective on Commerce Department forcing Anthropic to shut down Fable 5/Mythos 5 globally. Key new details: Commerce Secretary Lutnick signed the letter, deemed export doctrine was the legal mechanism, and competing narratives have emerged (NSA/Cyber Command claiming model broke into classified systems vs anonymous officials saying it only identified vulnerabilities). Partially paywalled.
main_article.wiki_action: enriched existing fable-5.md — added source, deemed export mechanism, competing narratives section, Commerce Dept/Lutnick details

triage_summary.notes: Single newsletter from Super Intel (Kim Isenberg). Covers two-week retrospective on Fable 5 export controls. Key new contributions vs existing wiki: (1) Commerce Secretary Lutnick identified as signatory, (2) 'deemed export' Cold War doctrine explained as legal mechanism, (3) competing narratives documented — Senator Warner/NSA vs anonymous AP source. Partly paywalled. Content integrated into existing concept page rather than creating new pages.
